# Process-narrative phrases — banned in execution-spec body prose only.
# Consumed by tests/hooks/artifact-discipline.bats _check_process_narrative_leakage.
# Referenced by rules/common/output-discipline.md §7.1 (execution-spec rubric).
#
# Pruned 2026-04-26 from 30 → 10 — kept well-attested process-narrative
# leaks; dropped speculative variants and dual-purpose phrases ("turns out",
# "looking back", "in retrospect", "on further thought") that fire on
# legitimate retrospective analysis as often as on process narrative.
we considered
originally we
after reflection
having established
this document sets out to
we previously
we initially
in earlier versions
the prior version
as we discussed earlier
